Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 python -c "
import yt_dlp
url = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DuqC071teZA'
opts = {'skip_download': True, 'writesubtitles': True, 'writeautomaticsub': True, 'quiet': True}
with yt_dlp.YoutubeDL\(opts\) as ydl:
    info = ydl.extract_info\(url, download=False\)
auto = list\(info.get\('automatic_captions', {}\).keys\(\)\)
print\('auto langs:', auto\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python << 'PYEOF'
from pathlib import Path
from auto_reels.narration.elevenlabs import generate_speech
from auto_reels.gemini.agent import translate_to_es, translate_to_ptbr
from auto_reels.output import clean_text

# Read EN narration text \(transcription\)
trans = Path\("C:/Projects/auto-reels/output/2026-03-17/task-01/transcription.txt"\).read_text\(encoding="utf-8"\)
# Skip header lines \(start with #\)
lines = [l for l in trans.splitlines\(\) if not l.startswith\("#"\) and l.strip\(\)]
text_en = "\\n".join\(lines\)

print\(f"EN text: {len\(text_en\)} chars"\)

# Translate to ES
print\("--- Translating to ES ---"\)
text_es = translate_to_es\(text_en\)
print\(f"ES text: {len\(text_es\)} chars"\)

# Generate ES narration
print\("--- Generating ES narration ---"\)
out_es = Path\("C:/Projects/auto-reels/output/2026-03-17/task-01/es/narration.mp3"\)
result = generate_speech\(clean_text\(text_es\), out_es\)
print\(f"ES result: {result}, exists: {out_es.exists\(\)}, size: {out_es.stat\(\).st_size if out_es.exists\(\) else 0}"\)

# Translate to PTBR
print\("--- Translating to PTBR ---"\)
text_ptbr = translate_to_ptbr\(text_en\)
print\(f"PTBR text: {len\(text_ptbr\)} chars"\)

# Generate PTBR narration
print\("--- Generating PTBR narration ---"\)
out_ptbr = Path\("C:/Projects/auto-reels/output/2026-03-17/task-01/ptbr/narration.mp3"\)
result = generate_speech\(clean_text\(text_ptbr\), out_ptbr\)
print\(f"PTBR result: {result}, exists: {out_ptbr.exists\(\)}, size: {out_ptbr.stat\(\).st_size if out_ptbr.exists\(\) else 0}"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python << 'PYEOF'
from pathlib import Path
from rich.console import Console
from rich.rule import Rule
from auto_reels.video_gen.glabs import generate_videos
from auto_reels.editing.compose import compose_final_video

console = Console\(\)
task_dir = Path\("C:/Projects/auto-reels/output/2026-03-17/task-01"\)
veo_prompts_path = task_dir / "veo_prompts.txt"

for lang, label in [\("es", "ES"\), \("ptbr", "PT-BR"\)]:
    lang_dir = task_dir / lang
    img_dir = lang_dir / "images"
    video_dir = lang_dir / "videos"
    narration_file = lang_dir / "narration.mp3"

    console.print\(Rule\(f"[bold cyan]{label}[/bold cyan]"\)\)

    # Generate clips
    console.print\(f"  • Clipes Veo3 [{label}]"\)
    char_images = sorted\(img_dir.glob\("*.png"\)\) if img_dir.exists\(\) else []
    generated = generate_videos\(veo_prompts_path, video_dir, image_paths=char_images or None\)
    console.print\(f"  {len\(generated\)} clipes gerados"\)

    # Compose final video
    clips = sorted\(video_dir.glob\("scene_*.mp4"\)\) if video_dir.exists\(\) else []
    if clips and narration_file.exists\(\):
        console.print\(f"  • Composição final [{label}] \({len\(clips\)} clipes\)"\)
        final_path = lang_dir / "final.mp4"
        compose_final_video\(video_dir, narration_file, final_path, num_scenes=len\(clips\), sync_path=None\)

console.print\(Rule\("[bold green]Concluído![/bold green]", style="green"\)\)
PYEOF)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python << 'PYEOF'
from pathlib import Path
from rich.console import Console
from rich.rule import Rule
from auto_reels.video_gen.glabs import generate_videos
from auto_reels.editing.compose import compose_final_video

console = Console\(\)
task_dir = Path\("C:/Projects/auto-reels/output/2026-03-17/task-01"\)
veo_prompts_path = task_dir / "veo_prompts.txt"
lang_dir = task_dir / "en"
img_dir = lang_dir / "images"
video_dir = lang_dir / "videos"
narration_file = lang_dir / "narration.mp3"

console.print\(Rule\("[bold cyan]EN[/bold cyan]"\)\)

console.print\("  • Clipes Veo3 [EN]"\)
char_images = sorted\(img_dir.glob\("*.png"\)\) if img_dir.exists\(\) else []
generated = generate_videos\(veo_prompts_path, video_dir, image_paths=char_images or None\)
console.print\(f"  {len\(generated\)} clipes gerados"\)

clips = sorted\(video_dir.glob\("scene_*.mp4"\)\) if video_dir.exists\(\) else []
if clips and narration_file.exists\(\):
    console.print\(f"  • Composição final [EN] \({len\(clips\)} clipes\)"\)
    final_path = lang_dir / "final.mp4"
    compose_final_video\(video_dir, narration_file, final_path, num_scenes=len\(clips\), sync_path=None\)

console.print\(Rule\("[bold green]Concluído![/bold green]", style="green"\)\)
PYEOF)

from pathlib import Path
from auto_reels.editing.compose import compose_final_video

vid_dir = task_dir / 'videos'
narration = task_dir / 'narration.mp3'
final = task_dir / 'final.mp4'
clips = sorted\(vid_dir.glob\('scene_*.mp4'\)\)

" 2>&1)
